rationale.DELETE: Features with confirmed lookahead bias or zero predictive power — must be removed from all pipelines
rationale.QUARANTINE: Features with suspected issues requiring investigation before use

bars_since_sweep.reason: Lookahead bias: sweep detection uses future bars to confirm, making this feature leak forward information

ob_strength.reason: Lookahead bias: order block strength computed using post-formation volume and price action

ob_mitigation_depth.reason: Lookahead bias: mitigation requires observing future price action relative to order block

ob_distance_atr.reason: Depends on ob_strength for nearest-OB selection; may inherit lookahead if strength filter is used

ob_age_bars.reason: Depends on order block selection which may be biased by ob_strength; needs independent validation

build_features_v3_multi_asset.py.changes_required: Remove bars_since_sweep from sweeps block, remove ob_strength from obs block, remove ob_mitigation_depth from mit_inv block
